title: Path Core Motion Rail
summary: Added a data-driven motion rail to the Path Core Deck so SCAN, COMMAND, and ROUTE switches show a deliberate runner, progress value, and active beacon without adding vertical panels.
verification: python -m pytest E:\agent-company-lab\tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_core_motion.py -q failed before implementation on missing pathCoreMotionMeta.

Browser runtime: loaded platform_engineering Path Map in command deck, confirmed initial scan rail with three beacons and zero overflow, clicked ROUTE by measured coordinates, then confirmed active route beacon, 100% core progress, route rail mounted, mission scan/command strip unmounted, and overflow 0.
